Trade with the best global CFD platform
Invest in the top profitable companies in the world and open deals on the most popular assets with the help of a reliable broker Mind Vise
High profitability with professional traders
With a universal account in Mind Vise, clients can trade stocks, options, futures, currencies, bonds and funds around the world through a single system

Diversify your portfolio by reducing risk. Trade for more profit.
Cryptocurrencies. Stock. Indices.
Markets on Mind Vise
Mind Vise offers hundreds of investment instruments in the financial market. And each asset is a unique opportunity: cryptocurrencies and currency pairs, precious metals and commodities, stocks of promising companies and leading stock indices. Open an account to start earning today!
1
Go to registration page
To get started, go from the main page of the site to the section for creating a new account
2
Specify user details
Enter the contact details of the new user and go to your personal account after successful registration.
3
Deposit
Top up your account through your personal account using a credit card, cryptocurrency or any other convenient way.
4
Start earning
Enter the world of trading and get immediate access to over 300 trading instruments available on one platform.
Only 4 steps to open a trading account
After passing which you can start profitable trading with Mind Vise
A unique platform for comfortable trading from anywhere in the world
Mind Vise is an award-winning platform that allows you to trade the global financial markets.
Choose the account that suits you
In order to start earning with thousands of traders around the world right now, you just have to take the last step - choose the type of account that suits you
